static_exports.description: Self-contained HTML file of entire directory + active posts. Host anywhere.
JSON export of all public data. Use to build your own interface.

instructions.create_mirror: 1. Fork the repo. 2. Deploy to Vercel/Cloudflare/Netlify. 3. Point to same Supabase or use /api/export for static data. 4. Add your URL to this file via PR.
instructions.static_mirror: Fetch /api/export?format=html — it gives you a single self-contained HTML file with the full directory and all active posts. Upload that HTML file anywhere (GitHub Pages, IPFS, your own server).
instructions.ipfs: Pin the HTML export to IPFS. Share the CID. It's immutable and uncensorable.
instructions.telegram: Share the static HTML file in Telegram channels. It works as a local file too.
